title: rubus macrophyllus subsp. piletostachys
intro: Rubus macrophyllus subsp. piletostachys is a subspecies of the Rubus macrophyllus plant, commonly known as the large-leafed raspberry or giant raspberry. It is a perennial plant native to East Asia, known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Rubus macrophyllus subsp. piletostachys can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in herbal medicine to promote digestion, reduce pain, and boost the immune system.
